'''鈭歡-th-s''' ('''kagathas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabob|cabob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabob|cabob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-th-s
|-
! Lemma
| kagathas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigathas|thigathas]] || [[word:jigathas|jigathas]] || [[word:shigathas|shigathas]] || [[word:kigathas|kigathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugathas|thuthugathas]] || [[word:jujugathas|jujugathas]] || [[word:shushugathas|shushugathas]] || [[word:kukugathas|kukugathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugathas|thugathas]] || [[word:jugathas|jugathas]] || [[word:shugathas|shugathas]] || [[word:kugathas|kugathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugathas|thugathas]] || [[word:jugathas|jugathas]] || [[word:shugathas|shugathas]] || [[word:kugathas|kugathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegathas|thegathas]] || [[word:jegathas|jegathas]] || [[word:shegathas|shegathas]] || [[word:kegathas|kegathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogathas|thothogathas]] || [[word:jojogathas|jojogathas]] || [[word:shoshogathas|shoshogathas]] || [[word:kokogathas|kokogathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogathas|thogathas]] || [[word:jogathas|jogathas]] || [[word:shogathas|shogathas]] || [[word:kogathas|kogathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogathas|thogathas]] || [[word:jogathas|jogathas]] || [[word:shogathas|shogathas]] || [[word:kogathas|kogathas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]] || [[word:gathas|gathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gathas|th忙gathas]] || [[word:j忙gathas|j忙gathas]] || [[word:sh忙gathas|sh忙gathas]] || [[word:k忙gathas|k忙gathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagathas|thathagathas]] || [[word:jajagathas|jajagathas]] || [[word:shashagathas|shashagathas]] || [[word:kakagathas|kakagathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagathas|thagathas]] || [[word:jagathas|jagathas]] || [[word:shagathas|shagathas]] || [[word:kagathas|kagathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagathas|thagathas]] || [[word:jagathas|jagathas]] || [[word:shagathas|shagathas]] || [[word:kagathas|kagathas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagathas|shagathas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagathas|goshagathas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagathas|gokishagathas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagathasn眉|shagathasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagathasnkn眉|goshagathasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathasn眉|gokishagathasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagathassh毛|shagathassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagathasnksh毛|goshagathasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagathassh毛|gokishagathassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathasro|shagathasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathasnkro|goshagathasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathasro|gokishagathasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathasmu|shagathasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathasnkmu|goshagathasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathasmu|gokishagathasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagathassher|shagathassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagathasnksher|goshagathasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagathassher|gokishagathassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagathasng|shagathasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagathasnkng|goshagathasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagathasng|gokishagathasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagathasya|shagathasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagathasnkya|goshagathasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagathasya|gokishagathasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagathasyam|shagathasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagathasnkyam|goshagathasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagathasyam|gokishagathasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathasn眉sh毛|shagathasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathasnkn眉sh毛|goshagathasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathasn眉sh毛|gokishagathasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathasn眉ro|shagathasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathasnkn眉ro|goshagathasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathasn眉ro|gokishagathasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathasn眉mu|shagathasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathasnkn眉mu|goshagathasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathasn眉mu|gokishagathasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathassh毛n眉|shagathassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathasnksh毛n眉|goshagathasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathassh毛n眉|gokishagathassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathassh毛ro|shagathassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathasnksh毛ro|goshagathasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathassh毛ro|gokishagathassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathassh毛mu|shagathassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathasnksh毛mu|goshagathasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathassh毛mu|gokishagathassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathasron眉|shagathasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathasnkron眉|goshagathasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathasron眉|gokishagathasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathasrosh毛|shagathasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathasnkrosh毛|goshagathasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathasrosh毛|gokishagathasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathasromu|shagathasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathasnkromu|goshagathasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathasromu|gokishagathasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathasmun眉|shagathasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathasnkmun眉|goshagathasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathasmun眉|gokishagathasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathasmush毛|shagathasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathasnkmush毛|goshagathasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathasmush毛|gokishagathasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathasmuro|shagathasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathasnkmuro|goshagathasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathasmuro|gokishagathasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
